questions.question: What is the main difference between a microcontroller and a microprocessor?
questions.hint: Both are digital systems but a microcontroller has additional components for I/O operations.

questions.question: Explain the concept of 'Bus Width' in digital design. How does it affect data transfer speed?
questions.hint: Discuss the impact of bus width on data transfer speed and its implications in digital design.

questions.question: Describe the difference between a bus and a channel in digital communication. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Both are used for data transfer but they differ in their functionality and usage in digital systems.
